tasks.subject: Task 1: meson installs the layer manifest + desktop entry
tasks.description:
**Goal:** meson install --prefix=X emits the host binary, layer .so, the install-time layer manifest (absolute library_path), and the desktop entry, for any prefix.

**Files:** Modify meson.build (top-level)

**Verify:** meson install --destdir + assert 4 files & manifest path (STAGE_OK); meson test -C build Fail: 0

```json:metadata
{"files": ["meson.build"], "verifyCommand": "meson install -C build --destdir=/tmp/choir-stage && meson test -C build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["4 install files present", "manifest library_path = /usr/lib/choir/libchoir_overlay.so", "install-manifest in build/ not build/src/layer/", "22/22 tests"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: simplify install-user.sh to consume meson's manifest
tasks.description:
**Goal:** install-user.sh drops its hand-written manifest block and relies on meson install (now emitting the ~/.local-prefixed manifest).

**Files:** Modify packaging/install-user.sh

**Verify:** bash packaging/install-user.sh; grep ~/.local path in manifest; vulkaninfo | grep -i choir (USER_OK)

```json:metadata
{"files": ["packaging/install-user.sh"], "verifyCommand": "bash packaging/install-user.sh", "acceptanceCriteria": ["manual manifest cat block removed", "~/.local manifest has correct library_path", "vulkaninfo shows choir"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: packaging/PKGBUILD (local-buildable pacman package)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** A PKGBUILD that builds Choir offline from the local tree and packages it for pacman; makepkg produces a .pkg.tar.zst with the expected /usr tree.

**Files:** Create packaging/PKGBUILD

**Verify:** cd packaging && makepkg -f && pacman -Qpl choir-*.pkg.tar.zst (PKG_OK)

```json:metadata
{"files": ["packaging/PKGBUILD"], "verifyCommand": "cd packaging && makepkg -f && pacman -Qpl choir-*.pkg.tar.zst", "acceptanceCriteria": ["makepkg -f builds the package", "pacman -Qpl lists the 4 files", "nothing installed to live system"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: adopt + smoke-test the package via pacman (optional)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Install the built package system-wide and confirm the overlay is discoverable (user adoption check).

**USER-ORDERED GATE — NON-SKIPPABLE.** Close only after every acceptanceCriteria item is re-validated independently with output captured.

**Files:** none (install + manual test)

**Verify:** user runs `cd packaging && makepkg -si`, then `vulkaninfo | grep -i choir`, then launches a game.

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "cd packaging && makepkg -si && vulkaninfo | grep -i choir", "acceptanceCriteria": ["makepkg -si installs cleanly", "vulkaninfo shows choir", "choir launches and a game shows the overlay"], "userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate"], "requiresUserSpecification": false, "gateScope": "manual-adoption"}
```
